languages.text: Eogunn creates the energy wall with the length of {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells for 1 round. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal {uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} bonus Shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armor penetration. Requires 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g} to be used, which are spent upon use. This ability can be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn creates the energy wall with the length of {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells for 1 round. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal {uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} bonus Shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armor penetration. Requires 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g} to be used, which are spent upon use. This ability can be used once per combat.

languages.text: For 1 round, Eogunn creates an energy wall that occupies {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells in a straight line. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armour penetration. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. ! Can only be used once per combat.

Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal {uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} bonus Shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armor penetration. Requires 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g} to be used, which are spent upon use. This ability can be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text:
For 1 round, Eogunn creates an energy wall that occupies {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells in a straight line. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armour penetration.
Targets that pass through this area suffer from {uip|MinDamage|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} to {uip|MaxDamage|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage with {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} armour penetration.
This ability can be used only once per combat.

For 1 round, Eogunn creates an energy wall that occupies {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells in a straight line. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armour penetration. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. ! Can only be used once per combat.

For 1 round, Eogunn creates an energy wall that occupies {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells in a straight line. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armour penetration. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. ! Can only be used once per combat.

languages.text: На 1 раунд Эоганн создает энергетическую стену, занимающую {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} клеток по прямой линии. Дистанционные атаки Эоганна или его союзников через эту область наносят дополнительно +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} электрического урона и имеют на +{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% больше пробития брони. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 2 уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}. Они снимаются после использования. Эту способность можно использовать только один раз за бой.
languages.original_text: For 1 round, Eogunn creates an energy wall that occupies {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells in a straight line. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armour penetration. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. ! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: На 1 раунд Эоганн создает энергетическую стену, занимающую {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} клеток по прямой линии. Дистанционные атаки Эоганна или его союзников через эту область наносят дополнительно +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} электрического урона и имеют на +{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% больше пробития брони. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 2 уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}. Они снимаются после использования. Эту способность можно использовать только один раз за бой.

На 1 раунд Эоганн создает энергетическую стену, занимающую {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} клеток по прямой линии. Дистанционные атаки Эоганна или его союзников через эту область наносят дополнительно +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} электрического урона и имеют на +{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% больше пробития брони. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 2 уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}. Они снимаются после использования. Эту способность можно использовать только один раз за бой.

languages.text: Durante 1 asalto, Eogunn crea un muro de energía que ocupa {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} casillas en línea recta. Los ataques a distancia que Eogunn o sus aliados hagan a través de esta área infligen +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} de daño de conmoción adicional y tienen un +{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} % de penetración de armadura. Para usar esta capacidad, Eogunn debe tener al menos 2 acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se eliminan tras su uso. ! Solo funciona una vez por combate.
languages.original_text: For 1 round, Eogunn creates an energy wall that occupies {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells in a straight line. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armour penetration. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. ! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: Durante 1 asalto, Eogunn crea un muro de energía que ocupa {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} casillas en línea recta. Los ataques a distancia que Eogunn o sus aliados hagan a través de esta área infligen +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} de daño de conmoción adicional y tienen un +{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} % de penetración de armadura. Para usar esta capacidad, Eogunn debe tener al menos 2 acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se eliminan tras su uso. ! Solo funciona una vez por combate.

languages.text: Eogunn erzeugt 1 Runde lang eine Energiewand, die {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} Felder in einer geraden Linie umfasst. Farnkampfangriffe von Eogunn oder seinen Verbündeten durch diesen Bereich verursachen +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} Schockschaden und haben eine {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} % höhere Rüstungsdurchdringung. Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht Eogunn mindestens 2 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird. ! Kann nur einmal pro Kampf eingesetzt werden.
languages.original_text: For 1 round, Eogunn creates an energy wall that occupies {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells in a straight line. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armour penetration. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. ! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn erzeugt 1 Runde lang eine Energiewand, die {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} Felder in einer geraden Linie umfasst. Farnkampfangriffe von Eogunn oder seinen Verbündeten durch diesen Bereich verursachen +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} Schockschaden und haben eine {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} % höhere Rüstungsdurchdringung. Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht Eogunn mindestens 2 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird. ! Kann nur einmal pro Kampf eingesetzt werden.

languages.text: Pendant 1 round, Eogunn crée un mur d'énergie qui occupe {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cases en ligne droite. Quand ses attaques à distance ou celles de ses alliés traversent cette zone, elles infligent +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} points de dégâts d'électrocution supplémentaires et bénéficient de +{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} % de pénétration d'armure en plus. Pour utiliser cette capacité, Eogunn doit disposer d'au moins 2 cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui seront consommés.  ! Utilisable une fois par combat.
languages.original_text: For 1 round, Eogunn creates an energy wall that occupies {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells in a straight line. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armour penetration. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. ! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: Pendant 1 round, Eogunn crée un mur d'énergie qui occupe {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cases en ligne droite. Quand ses attaques à distance ou celles de ses alliés traversent cette zone, elles infligent +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} points de dégâts d'électrocution supplémentaires et bénéficient de +{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} % de pénétration d'armure en plus. Pour utiliser cette capacité, Eogunn doit disposer d'au moins 2 cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui seront consommés.  ! Utilisable une fois par combat.

languages.text: Eogunn, düz bir çizgideki {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} hücreyi kaplayan bir enerji duvarı oluşturur. Duvar, 1 raunt boyunca kalır. Eogunn veya dost birimlerinin yaptığı, bu alandan geçen menzilli saldırılar; ilave +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} şok hasarı verir ve +%{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} daha fazla zırh delme değerine sahiptir. Eogunn'un bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 2 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar. ! Her çatışmada sadece bir kez kullanılabilir.
languages.original_text: For 1 round, Eogunn creates an energy wall that occupies {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells in a straight line. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armour penetration. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. ! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, düz bir çizgideki {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} hücreyi kaplayan bir enerji duvarı oluşturur. Duvar, 1 raunt boyunca kalır. Eogunn veya dost birimlerinin yaptığı, bu alandan geçen menzilli saldırılar; ilave +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} şok hasarı verir ve +%{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} daha fazla zırh delme değerine sahiptir. Eogunn'un bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 2 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar. ! Her çatışmada sadece bir kez kullanılabilir.

languages.text: 在1轮内，伊奥贡在一条直线上创造一堵占据{uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}格的能量墙。伊奥贡或其盟友的远程攻击穿过该区域时，额外造成{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}点电击伤害，并额外获得{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}%护甲穿透。 伊奥贡至少拥有2层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}，才能使用此能力，使用后消耗2层。 ！此能力每场战斗只能使用一次。
languages.original_text: For 1 round, Eogunn creates an energy wall that occupies {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells in a straight line. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armour penetration. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. ! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: 在1轮内，伊奥贡在一条直线上创造一堵占据{uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}格的能量墙。伊奥贡或其盟友的远程攻击穿过该区域时，额外造成{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}点电击伤害，并额外获得{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}%护甲穿透。 伊奥贡至少拥有2层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}，才能使用此能力，使用后消耗2层。 ！此能力每场战斗只能使用一次。

languages.text: 1ラウンドの間、エオガンは直線上に{uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}マスを占めるエネルギーの壁を生成する。エオガンまたはその味方がこの範囲を通して行う遠隔攻撃は、追加で+{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}のショックダメージを与え、{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}%多くの装甲貫通を持つ。 このアビリティを使用するには、エオガンが少なくとも2スタックの{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}を持っている必要があり、使用後に除去される。 ！ 戦闘ごとに1回のみ使用可能。
languages.original_text: For 1 round, Eogunn creates an energy wall that occupies {uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} cells in a straight line. Ranged attacks made by Eogunn or his allies through this area deal an additional +{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb} shock damage and have {uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}% more armour penetration. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards. ! Can only be used once per combat.

traits.locale_text: 1ラウンドの間、エオガンは直線上に{uip|AbilityRange|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}マスを占めるエネルギーの壁を生成する。エオガンまたはその味方がこの範囲を通して行う遠隔攻撃は、追加で+{uip|DamageBonus|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}のショックダメージを与え、{uip|ArmorPenetration|e895e579fb5a4eeaa9608675b86d50cb}%多くの装甲貫通を持つ。 このアビリティを使用するには、エオガンが少なくとも2スタックの{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}を持っている必要があり、使用後に除去される。 ！ 戦闘ごとに1回のみ使用可能。
